education_required: Diploma in Mechanical / Production / B.Tech/B.E in Mechanical / Production
raw_text:
36. Preventive Maintenance Engineer (Tooling)

Job Summary  
Focuses on planning and executing preventive maintenance strategies to minimize tool 
failures and downtime.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Develop and implement preventive maintenance plans  
• Schedule regular inspections and servicing  
• Analyze failure trends and improv e maintenance strategies  
• Maintain maintenance records and KPIs  
• Coordinate with tool room and production teams  
• Ensure compliance with safety and quality standards  
Required Skills  
• Preventive and predictive maintenance knowledge  
• Data analysis and reporti ng  
• Root cause analysis  
• Planning and organizational skills  
Qualification  
• Diploma / B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Production  
Experience  
• 3–7 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹30,000 – ₹65,000 per month
